cent to cluster 1 had an RR of 3.55 (p < 0.001) also covers single tract in central DC in ward 2.
The lowest RR 1.25 (p < 0.001) was calculated in cluster 6 in ward 1. All of the not co-infected
clusters have a p-value of less than 0.001 (Fig 2B). (Fig 2A and 2B about here).
The largest co-infection cluster was located covering tracts of wards 1, 6 and parts of wards 2, 5
and 8 while not coinfected clusters were spread across the district with smaller radiuses. The
